metadata.title: Client Asking for Extra Work | FlowDockr Guide
metadata.description: Handle out-of-scope requests without damaging relationship quality.

hero.title: Extra work requests need a scope rule, not a quick yes.
hero.description: Protect delivery quality and timeline with change-request language.

usage.label: Guide
usage.title: Problem -> Why -> Solution
usage.description: Separate approved scope from add-on requests.

items.title: Problem
items.description: Clients request additional deliverables after work starts.

items.title: Why it happens
items.description: No explicit wording exists for in-scope vs new tasks.

items.title: Solution
items.description: Use a fixed scope rule and quote add-ons before execution.

cta.title: Generate your revision policy ->
cta.description: Convert extra-work pressure into clear project terms.
